node.title: Uber | SSE | Remote (India) | Aug - Sep 2022 |  Rejected

topic.title: Uber | SSE | Remote (India) | Aug - Sep 2022 |  Rejected

post.content:
**1st Rounds (Problem Solving)**
	Q: Print next smallest palindrome.
	Input: 12301, 12321
	Output: 12321, 12421

**2nd Round (Problem Solving)**
	Q: Reshuffle array in place and also determine how good is shuffling function.
	Received rejection for this round, but I pushed HR for another round as feedback for first round was positive.

**3rd Round: Design Round (HLD)** 
Design location feed for ubereats. 
Restaurant data needs to be feed in the database along with its location. 
Write API to get the list of nearby restaurant feeds with pagination based on current location.
More focus was on designing the location database for update and fetching the list of restaurant based on current location.

I have tried using the quad tree. But somehow interviewer was not convinced. 

**Verdict: Rejected after design round.**
OP can you explain what was your thought process for solving first problem.
